entry.title: New: Reso 25-180 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"REFERRING TO THE MAUI PLANNING COMMISSION A PROPOSED BILL RELATING TO A CONDITIONAL CHANGE IN ZONING FROM R-2 RESIDENTIAL DISTRICT TO P-1 PUBLIC/QUASI-PUBLIC DISTRICT (CONDITIONAL ZONING) FOR 3.255 ACRES AT LAHAINA, HAWAIʻI, TAX MAP KEYS (2) 4-5-002:005 AND 006 (LAHAINA UNITED METHODIST CHURCH)"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
